title: The Hard Thing About Hard Things
author: Ben Horowitz
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant brick wall section. 14 rows x 6 columns of bricks, hairline outline. ONE brick in the wall is RED — the 'hard thing' you can't pretend away. -->
  <g transform="translate(160 1180)" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
    <!-- Row 1 (offset start) -->
    <rect x="100" y="0" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="300" y="0" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="500" y="0" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="700" y="0" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="900" y="0" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1100" y="0" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- Row 2 (start at 0) -->
    <rect x="0" y="80" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="200" y="80" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="400" y="80" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="600" y="80" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="800" y="80" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1000" y="80" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1200" y="80" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- Row 3 -->
    <rect x="100" y="160" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="300" y="160" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="500" y="160" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="700" y="160" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="900" y="160" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1100" y="160" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- Row 4 -->
    <rect x="0" y="240" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="200" y="240" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="400" y="240" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="600" y="240" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="800" y="240" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1000" y="240" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1200" y="240" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- Row 5 -->
    <rect x="100" y="320" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="300" y="320" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="500" y="320" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="700" y="320" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="900" y="320" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1100" y="320" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- Row 6 -->
    <rect x="0" y="400" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="200" y="400" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="400" y="400" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="600" y="400" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="800" y="400" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1000" y="400" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1200" y="400" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- Row 7 -->
    <rect x="100" y="480" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="300" y="480" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="500" y="480" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="700" y="480" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="900" y="480" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1100" y="480" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- Row 8 -->
    <rect x="0" y="560" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="200" y="560" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="400" y="560" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="600" y="560" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="800" y="560" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1000" y="560" width="200" height="80"/>
    <rect x="1200" y="560" width="200" height="80"/>
    <!-- The RED brick — the hard thing. Located at row 5 (offset start) col 2 — i.e. (300, 320) to (500, 400) -->
    <rect x="300" y="320" width="200" height="80" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="400" y="368" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.2em">HARD</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="1990" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">THERE IS NO RECIPE</text>
</svg>
rationale: A 14-row brick wall, hairline outline only, fills the lower 2/3. ONE brick in the middle of the wall is solid red 2px outline + filled, labeled 'HARD' in white caps. The visual: the wall IS your company, and one brick is the problem with no easy answer. Title 280px uppercase, two lines, is the kind of title you put on a brick wall.
